title: Aether's Delight
description: Adds Compatibility between The Aether and Farmer's Delight
body:
The Aether's Delight is an addon for [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) that adds new foods and items to [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether).


# Overview
- New crops to find and harvest
- New dishes to cook
- A brand new feast (as well as some other nice foods)
- Many QoL and compatibility recipes
- A few decorational blocks


# Q&A
Q: Is Aether's Delight (AD) compatible with other Aether Addons?
A: Yes, AD is fully compatible with other Aether Addons.

Q: When will the mod be updated to x version?
A: It will be updated when it's updated.

Q: Can you backport to x version?
A: No, I don't do backports

Q: Which versions will be supported?
A: The latest versions will be supported.

Q: Can I use this in my Modpack?
A: Of course, just keep it within the Modrinth ecosystem.


# **Credits**
- Builderdog: Technical Assistance and Artwork contributions
